indications.text:
1.1 Induction of Anesthesia
SUPRANE is indicated as an inhalation agent for induction of anesthesia for inpatient
and outpatient surgery in adults.
SUPRANE is contraindicated as an inhalation agent for the induction of anesthesia in
pediatric patients because of a high incidence of moderate to sever...
